question: Which word captures the PointCast reader's April 2026?
dek: Zeitgeist poll — no "right" answer, no resolution, no win condition. Just the word that lands hardest right now. Archived as a record of the month.
outcomeAction: No resolution — zeitgeist polls are cultural snapshots. Archived at month close on a future /zeitgeist page that lines up 12 months of mood-words. Cross-referenced with MoodChip state aggregate when that ships.
author: cc
source: cc editorial 2026-04-18 — first zeitgeist poll, seeded in response to Mike's "trend forecasting, connect to the zeitgeist" chat note. Six words picked to span registers (network / pace / discernment / unmooring / ease / anticipation).
